project.description:
Reactor Firmware Build Job

This build job uses STM32CubeIDE in headless mode to build the firmware

hudson.tasks.BatchFile.command:
REM ================================= Patch version.h ================================= powershell -Command "(Select-String -Path .\Appli\Source\Applications\version.h -Pattern MAJOR_VERSION | ForEach-Object Line) -replace '[^0-9]', '' | Out-File majorver.tmp -Encoding ASCII" powershell -Command "(Select-String -Path .\Appli\Source\Applications\version.h -Pattern MINOR_VERSION | ForEach-Object Line) -replace '[^0-9]', '' | Out-File minorver.tmp -Encoding ASCII" set /p FW_MAJOR_VER=<majorver.tmp set /p FW_MINOR_VER=<minorver.tmp
git rev-list %GIT_COMMIT% --count > gitcount.tmp set /p COMMIT=<gitcount.tmp
set /a GIT_COUNT=%COMMIT% set /a BUILD_NUM1=%COMMIT% / 256 set /a BUILD_NUM2=%COMMIT% %% 256 set BIN_VERSION=%FW_MAJOR_VER%.%FW_MINOR_VER%.%BUILD_NUM1%.%BUILD_NUM2% echo BIN_VERSION=%BIN_VERSION% >> inject.properties
cd %WORKSPACE%\Appli\Source\Applications
powershell -Command "(gc version.h) -replace 'GIT_COMMIT_COUNT 0', 'GIT_COMMIT_COUNT %GIT_COUNT%' | Out-File version.h"
REM Get rid of NULL bytes polluted by power shell type version.h > version.tmp del version.h rename version.tmp version.h
echo "Modified version.h content:" type version.h REM =============================================================================

REM ================================= Patch user_config.h =================================
REM Switch to config folder cd %WORKSPACE%\Appli\Source\Common\config
REM Patch Reactor version based on DEVICE_NAME if "%DEVICE_NAME%" == "Reactor 50" ( powershell -Command "(gc user_config.h) -replace '#define USER_CONFIG_REACTOR_VERSION REACTOR_100W', '#define USER_CONFIG_REACTOR_VERSION REACTOR_50W' | Out-File user_config.h"
REM Remove NULL bytes introduced by PowerShell type user_config.h > user_config.tmp del user_config.h rename user_config.tmp user_config.h )
REM Patch running mode based on USER_RUNNING_MODE echo Setting USER_CONFIG_RUNNING_MODE to %USER_RUNNING_MODE%
powershell -Command "(gc user_config.h) -replace '#define USER_CONFIG_RUNNING_MODE .*', '#define USER_CONFIG_RUNNING_MODE %USER_RUNNING_MODE%' | Out-File user_config.h"
REM Remove NULL bytes introduced by PowerShell type user_config.h > user_config.tmp del user_config.h rename user_config.tmp user_config.h
REM =============================================================================

REM Set PATH for STM32CubeIDE. SET "CUBEIDE_PATH=C:\ST\STM32CubeIDE_1.17.0\STM32CubeIDE" SET OLD_PATH=%PATH% SET PATH=%CUBEIDE_PATH%;%PATH%
REM =============================================================================
REM Build Reactor firmware SET PROJECT=reactor-fw_Appli/Debug SET ST_WORKSPACE=C:\Users\pgqa\STM32CubeIDE\workspace_1.17.0 SET CONSOLE=-vmargs -Dorg.eclipse.cdt.core.console=org.eclipse.cdt.core.systemConsole SET HEADLESS=--launcher.suppressErrors -nosplash -application org.eclipse.cdt.managedbuilder.core.headlessbuild stm32cubeidec.exe %HEADLESS% -data %ST_WORKSPACE% -importAll %WORKSPACE% -no-indexer -build %PROJECT% %CONSOLE%
REM Check the build result cd %WORKSPACE%\Appli\Debug if exist reactor-fw_Appli.bin ( echo Build OK ) else ( echo Build failed! Try again! cd %WORKSPACE%\Appli git checkout HEAD -- .project git checkout HEAD -- .cproject rm -rf Debug
stm32cubeidec.exe %HEADLESS% -data %ST_WORKSPACE% -no-indexer -build %PROJECT% %CONSOLE% )
SET PATH=%OLD_PATH%
REM =============================================================================
REM Rename the bin file cd %WORKSPACE%\Appli\Debug if "%DEVICE_NAME%" == "Reactor 50" ( rename reactor-fw_Appli.bin reactor50-fw-%BIN_VERSION%.bin ) else if "%DEVICE_NAME%" == "Reactor 100" ( rename reactor-fw_Appli.bin reactor100-fw-%BIN_VERSION%.bin ) else ( rename reactor-fw_Appli.bin reactor-fw-%BIN_VERSION%.bin )
